subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones! Since the name of the village was pleasing unto the Wronged One, We therefore made no change therein. It is Our hope that from the Most Exalted Pen it may be designated as the Mother of Cities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیائی چون اسم قریه نزد مظلوم پسندیده بود لذا تغییر ندادیم امید هست که از قلم اعلی به ام القری
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
